// core Java, from first principles

CoreCraft

Data structures, concurrency & a DI container — rebuilt by hand, test-driven.
11 components 104 tests green Java 21 zero deps
MyHashMap.java
public void put(K key, V value) {
  int i = index(key);
  Node<K,V> cur = table[i];
  if (cur == null) {      // empty bucket
    table[i] = new Node<>(key, value);
    return;
  }
  // walk the chain…
}
